app_review_information.notes:
StyleAI is a personal styling app that uses AI to analyze user wardrobes and provide fashion recommendations. The app requires camera permissions to analyze clothing items.

Demo Account:
- Email: demo@styleai.com
- Password: StyleAIDemo2024!

The demo account includes sample wardrobe items and completed onboarding.

Key features to test:
1. Wardrobe organization (Add Item screen)
2. Style analysis (Styling screen)
3. AI chat assistant (accessible from Styling screen)
4. Outfit suggestions (generated after style analysis)

The app uses Gemini AI API for style analysis and Firebase for backend services. All data is processed securely and in compliance with privacy regulations.

in_app_purchases.description: Unlock unlimited AI style analyses, advanced recommendations, and premium features
Get a full year of premium StyleAI features at a discounted rate

app_details.title: StyleAI
app_details.short_description: AI-powered personal stylist for fashion recommendations
app_details.full_description:
Transform your style with StyleAI, the AI-powered personal stylist that analyzes your wardrobe and provides personalized fashion recommendations.

🎯 SMART WARDROBE ORGANIZATION
• AI-powered categorization of your clothes
• Visual wardrobe management
• Easy item tagging and organization

🤖 AI STYLE ANALYSIS
• Personal style profile generation
• Body type and morphology analysis
• Color palette recommendations

👗 PERSONALIZED OUTFITS
• Custom outfit suggestions for any occasion
• Weather-appropriate recommendations
• Style matching and coordination

💬 AI STYLE ASSISTANT
• Interactive fashion advice chat
• Instant styling questions answered
• Trend insights and tips

✨ PREMIUM FEATURES
• Unlimited AI analyses
• Advanced style recommendations
• Personal shopping suggestions
• Priority customer support

Join thousands of users who have transformed their style with StyleAI. Download now and discover your perfect look!

📧 Support: support@styleai.com
🔒 Privacy Policy: https://styleai.com/privacy
📄 Terms of Service: https://styleai.com/terms
